TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv, title = {Seediq Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: = Taiwu = Nsgan Taiwu o gaga Nsgan Pingtung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 124.11 km¬≤, (dxgal dgiyaq o 62.71 km¬≤, dxgal pmblxan o 55.5 km¬≤). kmhbragan hiyi o 5,057, sapah o 1,288, seejiq tnpusu 4,921 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 97% (Paywang). Paywang ka hbaraw balay alang hini. Nyusan qpahan Nsgan Taiwu o niqan 6 alang ni maxal 9. 9 o, Qapedang , Kaviyangan , Ulaljuc (ś≥įś≠¶ ťÉ®ŤźĹ), Masisi , Piyuma , Ludja , Tjaialev , Puljetji , Tjaranauma . Pusupnyahan patas
S.PHON: = taiwu = nsgan taiwu o gaga nsgan piŇčtuŇč, kmp…ĺaan kana dxgal o ***.** km*, (dxgal dgijaq o **.** km*, dxgal pmblxan o **.* km*). kmńßb…ĺagan ńßiji o *,***, sapańß o *,***, s…ô…ô…üiq tnpusu *,*** ńßiji, knńßb…ĺagan ńßiji o **% (pajwaŇč). pajwaŇč ka ńßba…ĺaw balaj alaŇč ńßini. njusan qpańßan nsgan taiwu o niqan * alaŇč ni maxal *. * o, qap…ôdaŇč , ka*ijaŇčan , ulal…üu ¶ (** **), masisi , pijuma , lud…üa , t…üaial…ô* , pul…ü…ôt…üi , t…üa…ĺanauma . pusupnjańßan patas
S.FORM: = Taiwu = Nsgan Taiwu o gaga Nsgan Pingtung, kmpraan kana dxgal o 124.11 km¬≤, (dxgal dgiyaq o 62.71 km¬≤, dxgal pmblxan o 55.5 km¬≤). kmhbragan hiyi o 5,057, sapah o 1,288, seejiq tnpusu 4,921 hiyi, knhbragan hiyi o 97% (Paywang). Paywang ka hbaraw balay alang hini. Nyusan qpahan Nsgan Taiwu o niqan 6 alang ni maxal 9. 9 o, Qapedang , Kaviyangan , Ulaljuc (ś≥įś≠¶ ťÉ®ŤźĹ), Masisi , Piyuma , Ludja , Tjaialev , Puljetji , Tjaranauma . Pusupnyahan patas
